summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The preflight artifact reports all ten listed refs as open pull requests, no cluster-level canonical, and no allowed merge/fix/raise-pr/low-signal-close path. Nine PRs are classified conservatively for independent maintainer review or maintainer judgment, and #92860 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive.
